Package recoder.convenience

Class ForestWalker

java.lang.Object
recoder.convenience.AbstractTreeWalker
recoder.convenience.ForestWalker
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable, ProgramElementWalker
public class ForestWalker extends AbstractTreeWalker
Walks all syntax trees from a list of compilation units in depth-first order.

    • next

      public boolean next()
      Description copied from class: AbstractTreeWalker
      Proceeds to the next element, if available. Returns true, if there is one, false otherwise.
